en: Now these are the men who came to David at Ziklag, while he could not move about freely because of Saul the son of Kish. And they were among the mighty men who helped him in war.
zh: 大衛因為基士的兒子掃羅的緣故，躲在洗革拉的時候，以下這些人就來到大衛那裡；他們都是勇士，在戰爭中幫助他。

en: They were bowmen and could shoot arrows and sling stones with either the right or the left hand; they were Benjaminites, Saul's kinsmen.
zh: 他們配備弓箭，能用左右兩手開弓甩石射箭；他們都屬便雅憫支派，是掃羅的親族。

en: The chief was Ahiezer, then Joash, both sons of Shemaah of Gibeah; also Jeziel and Pelet, the sons of Azmaveth; Beracah, Jehu of Anathoth,
zh: 他們的首領是亞希以謝，其次是約阿施，都是基比亞人示瑪的兒子；還有亞斯瑪威的兒子耶薛和毘力；又有比拉迦和亞拿突人耶戶，

en: Ishmaiah of Gibeon, a mighty man among the thirty and a leader over the thirty; Jeremiah, Jahaziel, Johanan, Jozabad of Gederah,
zh: 以及基遍人以實買雅，他在三十人中是個勇士，並且統領那三十人，又有耶利米、雅哈悉、約哈難和基得拉人約撒拔 、

en: Eluzai, Jerimoth, Bealiah, Shemariah, Shephatiah the Haruphite;
zh: 伊利烏賽、耶利摩、比亞利雅、示瑪利雅、哈律弗人示法提雅；

en: Elkanah, Isshiah, Azarel, Joezer, and Jashobeam, the Korahites;
zh: 可拉人有以利加拿、耶西亞、亞薩列、約以謝和雅朔班、

en: And Joelah and Zebadiah, the sons of Jeroham of Gedor.
zh: 基多人耶羅罕的兒子猶拉和西巴第雅。

en: From the Gadites there went over to David at the stronghold in the wilderness mighty and experienced warriors, expert with shield and spear, whose faces were like the faces of lions and who were swift as gazelles upon the mountains:
zh: 迦得支派中，有些人走到曠野的山寨去投奔大衛，他們都是英勇的戰士，善於作戰，能使用盾牌和長槍；他們的面貌好像獅子，他們敏捷得好像山上的羚羊。

en: Ezer the chief, Obadiah second, Eliab third,
zh: 第一個是以薛，第二是俄巴底雅，第三是以利押，

en: Mishmannah fourth, Jeremiah fifth,
zh: 第四是彌施瑪拿，第五是耶利米，

en: Attai sixth, Eliel seventh,
zh: 第六是亞太，第七是以利業，

en: Johanan eighth, Elzabad ninth,
zh: 第八是約哈難，第九是以利薩巴，

en: Jeremiah tenth, Machbannai eleventh.
zh: 第十是耶利米，第十一是末巴奈。

en: These Gadites were officers of the army; the least was a match for a hundred men and the greatest for a thousand.
zh: 這些都是迦得支派中的軍長，最小的一個能抵擋一百人，最大的一個能抵擋一千人。

en: These are the men who crossed the Jordan in the first month, when it was overflowing all its banks, and put to flight all those in the valleys, to the east and to the west.
zh: 在正月，約旦河水漲過兩岸的時候，這些人過了河，使全平原的人都東奔西逃。

en: And some of the men of Benjamin and Judah came to the stronghold to David.
zh: 便雅憫支派和猶大支派中也有人來到山寨投奔大衛。

en: David went out to meet them and said to them, "If you have come to me in friendship to help me, my heart will be joined to you; but if to betray me to my adversaries, although there is no wrong in my hands, then may the God of our fathers see and rebuke you."
zh: 大衛出去迎見他們，對他們說：“你們若是存著和平的心到我這裡來幫助我，我就與你們結盟，但你們若是把我這無辜的人出賣給我的敵人，就願我們列祖的 神鑒察和審判。”

en: Then the Spirit clothed Amasai, chief of the thirty, and he said, "We are yours, O David, and with you, O son of Jesse! Peace, peace to you, and peace to your helpers! For your God helps you." Then David received them and made them officers of his troops.
zh: 當時， 神的靈降在那三十個勇士的首領亞瑪撒身上，他就說： “大衛啊，我們是來歸從你； 耶西的兒子啊，我們是來跟隨你； 願你平平安安， 願幫助你的人也都平安， 因為你的 神幫助了你。” 於是大衛收留了他們，立他們作軍長。

en: Some of the men of Manasseh deserted to David when he came with the Philistines for the battle against Saul. (Yet he did not help them, for the rulers of the Philistines took counsel and sent him away, saying, "At peril to our heads he will desert to his master Saul.")
zh: 大衛從前與非利士人一起，要去攻擊掃羅的時候，有些瑪拿西支派的人投奔大衛；但他們沒有幫助非利士人，因為非利士人的領袖商議後把他遣回，說：“恐怕大衛帶著我們的首級歸向他的主人掃羅。”

en: As he went to Ziklag, these men of Manasseh deserted to him: Adnah, Jozabad, Jediael, Michael, Jozabad, Elihu, and Zillethai, chiefs of thousands in Manasseh.
zh: 大衛回到洗革拉的時候，瑪拿西支派的押拿、約撒拔、耶疊、米迦勒、約撒拔、以利戶、洗勒太來投奔他，他們都是瑪拿西支派中的千夫長。

en: They helped David against the band of raiders, for they were all mighty men of valor and were commanders in the army.
zh: 他們幫助大衛，與他一同攻擊賊匪；他們全是英勇的戰士，是軍隊的領袖。

en: For from day to day men came to David to help him, until there was a great army, like an army of God.
zh: 那時，天天都有人投奔大衛，要幫助他，以致成了一支大軍，好像 神的軍兵一樣。

en: These are the numbers of the divisions of the armed troops who came to David in Hebron to turn the kingdom of Saul over to him, according to the word of the LORD.
zh: 預備作戰的首領來到希伯崙見大衛，要照著耶和華的命令把掃羅的國位轉歸大衛，他們的數目如下：

en: The men of Judah bearing shield and spear were 6,800 armed troops.
zh: 猶大支派的子孫拿盾牌和長槍的，共有六千八百人，都預備好作戰。

en: Of the Simeonites, mighty men of valor for war, 7,100.
zh: 西緬支派的子孫能作戰的英勇戰士，共有七千一百人。

en: Of the Levites 4,600.
zh: 利未支派的子孫中，共有四千六百人。

en: The prince Jehoiada, of the house of Aaron, and with him 3,700.
zh: 耶何耶大是亞倫家的領袖，跟隨他的，共有三千七百人。

en: Zadok, a young man mighty in valor, and twenty-two commanders from his own fathers' house.
zh: 還有一個年輕的英勇戰士撒督和他家族的二十二個領袖。

en: Of the Benjaminites, the kinsmen of Saul, 3,000, of whom the majority had to that point kept their allegiance to the house of Saul.
zh: 便雅憫支派的子孫中，掃羅的親族也有三千人，直到現在他們多半支持掃羅家。

en: Of the Ephraimites 20,800, mighty men of valor, famous men in their fathers' houses.
zh: 以法蓮支派的子孫中，在自己家族中有名聲的英勇的戰士，共有二萬零八百人。

en: Of the half-tribe of Manasseh 18,000, who were expressly named to come and make David king.
zh: 瑪拿西半個支派中有記名的，共一萬八千人，都來擁立大衛為王。

en: Of Issachar, men who had understanding of the times, to know what Israel ought to do, 200 chiefs, and all their kinsmen under their command.
zh: 以薩迦支派的子孫中，通曉時勢和知道以色列當怎樣行的，共有二百個首領；他們所有的親族都聽從他們的命令。

en: Of Zebulun 50,000 seasoned troops, equipped for battle with all the weapons of war, to help David with singleness of purpose.
zh: 西布倫支派的子孫中，能出去作戰、可以使用各種兵器，行軍整齊、不生二心的，共有五萬人。

en: Of Naphtali 1,000 commanders with whom were 37,000 men armed with shield and spear.
zh: 拿弗他利支派的子孫中，有一千個領袖；跟隨他們拿著盾牌和矛槍的，共有三萬七千人。

en: Of the Danites 28,600 men equipped for battle.
zh: 但支派的子孫中能作戰的，共有二萬八千六百人。

en: Of Asher 40,000 seasoned troops ready for battle.
zh: 亞設支派的子孫中，能出去上陣作戰的，共有四萬人。

en: Of the Reubenites and Gadites and the half-tribe of Manasseh from beyond the Jordan, 120,000 men armed with all the weapons of war.
zh: 在約旦河東岸，流本支派、迦得支派和瑪拿西半個支派的人中，能拿各種兵器作戰的，共有十二萬。

en: All these, men of war, arrayed in battle order, came to Hebron with full intent to make David king over all Israel. Likewise, all the rest of Israel were of a single mind to make David king.
zh: 以上這些戰士，行軍齊整，一心一意來到希伯崙，要立大衛作以色列王；其餘的以色列人也都一心一意要立大衛為王。

en: And they were there with David for three days, eating and drinking, for their brothers had made preparation for them.
zh: 他們在那裡三天，與大衛在一起吃喝，因為他們的親族給他們預備好了。

en: And also their relatives, from as far as Issachar and Zebulun and Naphtali, came bringing food on donkeys and on camels and on mules and on oxen, abundant provisions of flour, cakes of figs, clusters of raisins, and wine and oil, oxen and sheep, for there was joy in Israel.
zh: 在他們附近的人，甚至以薩迦、西布倫和拿弗他利支派的人，都用驢、駱駝、騾子和牛，給他們帶來了很多食物：麵餅、無花果餅、葡萄餅乾、酒、油和許多牛羊，以色列全境就充滿歡樂。
